roles.title: Process Design Engineer
roles.advice: Learn to work WITH AI simulation tools. Your process intuition + AI speed = unbeatable combination.

roles.title: Mining Process Engineer
topThreats: AI predictive maintenance replacing routine inspections
roles.advice: The Pilbara is already one of the most AI-intensive industrial environments on Earth. Position yourself at the human-AI interface.

roles.title: Safety & Risk Engineer
topThreats: AI-assisted HAZOP may reduce team sizes
roles.advice: Safety judgement is hard to automate. Your role is defensible but evolving. Learn to validate AI safety recommendations.

roles.title: Lab Analyst / QC Chemist
roles.advice: Routine analysis is being automated. Move toward method development, troubleshooting, and AI-assisted interpretation.

roles.title: Environmental / Sustainability Engineer
roles.advice: Regulation is your moat. AI can crunch the data but interpreting it within Australian environmental law requires human expertise.

roles.title: Water Treatment Engineer
roles.advice: Water utilities like SA Water and Melbourne Water are early in AI adoption. Getting in now means you shape how it's deployed.
